positive: A whimsical storybook illustration of a tiny, friendly forest gnome reading a book to a group of glowing fireflies under a massive, bioluminescent mushroom cap. The style should be watercolor and gouache, featuring soft pastel tones, intricate detail, and a gentle, magical atmosphere. Storybook art, high saturation.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
